agent.status: Added a way back in for people who opted out of an area — they show up on the account page now with a one-tap 'I'm interested again'. Before this, opting out was a one-way door. That's the whole first batch of pre-launch UX gaps done.
agent.direction: Next batch: tell members when a captain pauses/retires their game, fix a couple of confusing dead-ends, then the invite-a-friend feature
